description: complete blood count (CBC) lab report with per-analyte results and patient metadata

name.description: the patient name without any honorific or title (exclude Mr., Mrs., Ms., Dr.).

age.description: the patient age as printed (may include a unit such as Y).

registrationNumber.description: the registration number printed as 'Regd. No.' on the report.

results.description: each CBC analyte result row with its value, units, reference range, and abnormal flag.

flag.description: the abnormal flag if printed (e.g. H for high, L for low), else null.
